description_long: This is a large, heavily armored military tank with a low, angular profile and a prominent main cannon extending from the front of its rotating turret. The vehicle features wide, robust tracks on both sides for traversing rough terrain, and its hull is covered in thick, sloped armor plating for maximum protection. The turret is equipped with several hatches, periscopes, and what appear to be communication antennas, indicating advanced operational capabilities. The rear section includes storage racks and additional equipment, while the sides display road wheels and suspension components typical of tracked combat vehicles. The overall finish is a matte, solid olive drab color, with no visible camouflage patterns or military insignia. The tank's design emphasizes durability, firepower, and crew protection, making it suitable for urban and battlefield environments.
description: A large, olive drab military tank with a long main cannon, thick sloped armor, and wide tracks for mobility. The turret features hatches, antennas, and storage racks, with no visible markings or camouflage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main cannon, sloped frontal armor, and wide tracks flanking the hull.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the cannon, turret details, road wheels, and side armor.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, exhaust grilles, and storage racks, with tracks visible on both sides.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tracks, turret, and hull profile with additional equipment on the rear deck.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret front; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped steel armor plating; turret and hull both heavily armored with no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive drab color; no camouflage pattern visible.
